meaning: to be higher (than the stated amount) by ...
sentence: 今年的销售额高出去年一倍。
pinyin: Jīn nián de xiāo shòu é gāo chū qù nián yī bèi.
english: This year's sales are double what they were last year.

meaning: to crack down on illegal activities; to fight organized crime
sentence: 警方最近开展了专项打黑行动。
pinyin: Jǐng fāng zuì jìn kāi zhǎn le zhuān xiàng dǎ hēi xíng dòng.
english: The police recently launched a special operation to crack down on organized crime.

meaning: the military and the police; military alert (announcing the approach o
sentence: 现场部署了大批军警维持秩序。
pinyin: Xiàn chǎng bù shǔ le dà pī jūn jǐng wéi chí zhì xù.
english: A large number of military and police were deployed on site to maintain order.

meaning: (attributive) (of a person) involved in sensitive, confidential work;
sentence: 这份机要文件不能随便传阅。
pinyin: Zhè fèn jī yào wén jiàn bù néng suí biàn chuán yuè.
english: This confidential document must not be passed around casually.

sentence: 老师纠正了我弹钢琴的指法。
pinyin: Lǎo shī jiū zhèng le wǒ tán gāng qín de zhǐ fǎ.
english: The teacher corrected my fingering when playing the piano.

sentence: 我们通过旅行社预订了酒店。
pinyin: Wǒmen tōngguò lǚxíngshè yùdìng le jiǔdiàn.
english: We booked the hotel through a travel agency.

meaning: have bad luck; be out of luck
sentence: 今天真倒霉，手机掉进水里了。
pinyin: Jīntiān zhēn dǎo méi, shǒujī diào jìn shuǐ lǐ le.
english: What terrible luck today — my phone fell in the water.

sentence: 这家餐厅在本地有很好的声誉。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cān tīng zài běn dì yǒu hěn hǎo de shēng yù.
english: This restaurant has a very good reputation locally.

sentence: 他每天晚上练习弹吉他。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān wǎnshang liànxí tán jítā.
english: He practices playing guitar every evening.

sentence: 我包里刚好有一枚一元硬币。
pinyin: Wǒ bāo lǐ gānghǎo yǒu yī méi yī yuán yìngbì.
english: I happened to have a one-yuan coin in my bag.

sentence: 这个村子保留了很多传统民俗。
pinyin: Zhè ge cūn zi bǎo liú le hěn duō chuán tǒng mín sú.
english: This village has preserved many traditional folk customs.

sentence: 报告里有一张图表，清楚显示了销售趋势。
pinyin: Bàogào lǐ yǒu yì zhāng túbiǎo, qīngchǔ xiǎnshìle xiāoshòu qūshì.
english: There's a chart in the report that clearly shows the sales trend.

meaning: to come out on top; to win (in an election, contest etc); success; vic
sentence: 她在比赛中凭实力胜出。
pinyin: Tā zài bǐsài zhōng píng shílì shèngchū.
english: She won the competition through her own ability.

sentence: 这个文件的编码格式是UTF-8。
pinyin: Zhège wénjiàn de biānmǎ géshì shì UTF-8.
english: This file's encoding format is UTF-8.

sentence: 他用望远镜观察远处的山。
pinyin: Tā yòng wàngyuǎnjìng guānchá yuǎnchù de shān.
english: He used binoculars to look at the mountains in the distance.

sentence: 警察正在询问案件中的受害人。
pinyin: Jǐngchá zhèngzài xúnwèn ànjiàn zhōng de shòuhàirén.
english: The police are questioning the victim in the case.

sentence: 这家创业公司找到了一位新投资人。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chuàngyè gōngsī zhǎodào le yī wèi xīn tóuzīrén.
english: This startup found a new investor.

sentence: 那栋废弃的楼里有种诡异的气氛。
pinyin: Nà dòng fèiqì de lóu lǐ yǒu zhǒng guǐyì de qìfēn.
english: There is a strange atmosphere inside that abandoned building.

meaning: 1. module (in software); 2. functional unit; 3. component part
sentence: 这款软件的每个模块都可以单独使用。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn ruǎnjiàn de měi gè mókuài dōu kěyǐ dāndú shǐyòng.
english: Each module of this software can be used independently.

sentence: 盐溶解在水中会变成离子。
pinyin: Yán róngjiě zài shuǐ zhōng huì biànchéng lízǐ.
english: Salt dissolves in water and becomes ions.

sentence: 最近那个国家政局动荡，很多人想离开。
pinyin: Zuìjìn nàgè guójiā zhèngjú dòngdàng, hěn duō rén xiǎng líkāi.
english: Recently that country's political situation has been turbulent and many people want to leave.

sentence: 他因为诈骗坐牢三年才出来。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi zhàpiàn zuòláo sān nián cái chūlái.
english: He served three years in prison for fraud before being released.

sentence: 现代科学技术让生活越来越方便。
pinyin: Xiàndài kēxué jìshù ràng shēnghuó yuèláiyuè fāngbiàn.
english: Modern science and technology make life more and more convenient.

sentence: 请在表格上注明您的联系方式。
pinyin: Qǐng zài biǎogé shàng zhùmíng nín de liánxì fāngshì.
english: Please clearly indicate your contact information on the form.

sentence: 博物馆建在工厂旧址上。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn jiàn zài gōngchǎng jiùzhǐ shang.
english: The museum was built on the old factory site.

meaning: 1. cavalry; 2. caravan of horses carrying goods
sentence: 一支马队穿过了山谷。
pinyin: Yī zhī mǎduì chuānguòle shāngǔ.
english: A caravan of horses passed through the valley.

meaning: 1. to console oneself; 2. to masturbate; 3. onanism; 4. masturbation
sentence: 他只能用这句话来自慰。
pinyin: Tā zhǐ néng yòng zhè jù huà lái zìwèi.
english: He could only use these words to console himself.

sentence: 这次行政区划调整影响了好几个县。
pinyin: Zhè cì xíng zhèng qū huà tiáo zhěng yǐng xiǎng le hǎo jǐ gè xiàn.
english: This administrative subdivision adjustment affected several counties.

sentence: 这个村子靠传统手工业维持生计。
pinyin: Zhè gè cūn zi kào chuán tǒng shǒu gōng yè wéi chí shēng jì.
english: This village survives on traditional handicrafts.

meaning: central bank (abbr. for 中央銀行|中央银行[zhong1 yang1 yin2 hang2])
sentence: 央行今天宣布降低利率。
pinyin: Yāng háng jīn tiān xuān bù jiàng dī lì lǜ.
english: The central bank announced a rate cut today.

sentence: 上半场结束时比数是二比零。
pinyin: Shàng bàn chǎng jié shù shí bǐ shù shì èr bǐ líng.
english: The score at halftime was two to zero.

meaning: to correct an erroneously written character; regular script (calligrap
sentence: 老师帮我把错别字改成了正字。
pinyin: Lǎo shī bāng wǒ bǎ cuò bié zì gǎi chéng le zhèng zì.
english: The teacher helped me correct the misspelled characters into their standard forms.

sentence: 印度次大陆拥有悠久的文明历史。
pinyin: Yìn dù cì dà lù yōng yǒu yōu jiǔ de wén míng lì shǐ.
english: The Indian subcontinent has a long history of civilization.

sentence: 短视频在年轻人中非常盛行。
pinyin: Duǎn shìpín zài niánqīngrén zhōng fēicháng shèngxíng.
english: Short videos are extremely popular among young people.

sentence: 她喜欢读鲁迅写的散文。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān dú Lǔ Xùn xiě de sǎnwén.
english: She enjoys reading the prose written by Lu Xun.

sentence: 公司今年招收了二十名新员工。
pinyin: Gōngsī jīnnián zhāoshōu le èrshí míng xīn yuángōng.
english: The company hired twenty new employees this year.

meaning: be practical and realistic; seek truth from facts
sentence: 我们讨论问题要实事求是，别夸大。
pinyin: Wǒmen tǎolùn wèntí yào shíshìqiúshì, bié kuādà.
english: When discussing issues, we should be practical and realistic, not exaggerate.

sentence: 工厂的污水排放污染了附近的河流。
pinyin: Gōng chǎng de wū shuǐ pái fàng wū rǎn le fù jìn de hé liú.
english: The factory's sewage discharge polluted the nearby river.

sentence: 我们在海边远远看到了一艘军舰。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài hǎibiān yuǎnyuǎn kàndào le yī sōu jūnjiàn.
english: We spotted a warship far off in the distance from the coast.

sentence: 公园里的桃花开了，很多人去拍照。
pinyin: Gōng yuán lǐ de táo huā kāi le, hěn duō rén qù pāi zhào.
english: The peach blossoms in the park have bloomed, and many people have gone to take photos.

sentence: 公司不断革新技术，保持竞争力。
pinyin: Gōngsī bùduàn gēxīn jìshù, bǎochí jìngzhēnglì.
english: The company continuously innovates its technology to stay competitive.

sentence: 超市每周末都会搞促销活动。
pinyin: Chāoshì měi zhōumò dōu huì gǎo cù xiāo huódòng.
english: The supermarket runs sales promotions every weekend.

meaning: 1. to infringe the rights of; 2. to violate; 3. infringement
sentence: 未经授权转载文章属于侵权行为。
pinyin: Wèi jīng shòuquán zhuǎnzǎi wénzhāng shǔyú qīn quán xíngwéi.
english: Reproducing an article without permission constitutes infringement.

sentence: 工厂搬到了郊外的开发区。
pinyin: Gōngchǎng bān dào le jiāowài de kāifāqū.
english: The factory moved to a development zone in the suburbs.

meaning: economy and trade (abbr. for 經濟貿易|经济贸易[jing1 ji4 mao4 yi4])
sentence: 两国的经贸合作越来越密切。
pinyin: Liǎng guó de jīngmào hézuò yuèláiyuè mìqiē.
english: Economic and trade cooperation between the two countries is growing closer.

meaning: 1. high ranking officer in Chinese army; 2. colonel
sentence: 那位上校刚从前线回来。
pinyin: Nà wèi shàngxiào gāng cóng qiánxiàn huílái.
english: That colonel just returned from the front line.

sentence: 我们正在评估几家供应商。
pinyin: Wǒmen zhèngzài pínggū jǐ jiā gōngyìngshāng.
english: We are currently evaluating several suppliers.

sentence: 他被派到上海的分公司工作。
pinyin: Tā bèi pài dào Shànghǎi de fēn gōngsī gōngzuò.
english: He was sent to work at the Shanghai branch office.

sentence: 这位金融家投资了多个领域。
pinyin: Zhè wèi jīnróngjiā tóuzīle duō gè lǐngyù.
english: This financier has invested in many sectors.

sentence: 债权人要求尽快还款。
pinyin: Zhàiquánrén yāoqiú jǐnkuài huánkuǎn.
english: The creditor demanded repayment as soon as possible.
